summary: Tested food_orders.py refactoring - Phase 1: Helper functions and constants extraction to food_order_helpers.py. All 12 tests passed. Backend starts without errors and all extracted functions work correctly.

helper_functions.get_driver_km_settings: PASS - Returns settings dict with enabled, base_fee, price_per_km, min_fee

constants_exported.HOT_FRESH_STORE_TYPES: PASS - Contains restaurants, cafes, bakery, drinks, sweets

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 refactoring of food_orders.py completed successfully. The following functions were extracted to food_order_helpers.py: get_first_name, calculate_haversine_distance (aliased as calculate_distance_km), get_driver_km_settings, calculate_driver_fee_by_km, get_store_delivery_category, get_driver_cancel_settings, calculate_driver_cancel_rate, add_commission_to_platform_wallet_food, send_priority_order_push_notification. Constants extracted: HOT_FRESH_STORE_TYPES, COLD_DRY_STORE_TYPES, DEFAULT_HOT_FRESH_LIMIT, DEFAULT_COLD_DRY_LIMIT, ORDER_STATUSES, PLATFORM_WALLET_ID. All imports in food_orders.py work correctly and the backend starts without errors.
